Chat Edit: '
Next: Phase 2 - UI Infrastructure 
Now that the foundation is solid, Phase 2 will implement:

File Browser (uses FileSystemManager)
Multi-Tab Editor (uses FileSystemManager, CommandDispatcher)
Build System Integration (uses LoggingSystem)
Settings Dialog (uses SettingsSystem)
Error Recovery UI (uses ErrorHandler)
Debug Console (uses LoggingSystem)
Ready to proceed with Phase 2? I can start implementing the file browser and multi-tab editor system immediately, which will bring the UI online with file management capabilities.'
Chat Edit: 'Dont disable ANY problematic source files, everything is to be fixed 1 by 1, no complexity/time issues!'
Chat Edit: 'Now let me add proper implementations for the stub functions. Let me implement the TODO functions:'
